title: Phunware CEO Mike Snavely Retires, Appoints Stephen Chen As Interim CEO; Stock Down
text: Phunware CEO Mike Snavely Retires, Appoints Stephen Chen As Interim CEO; Stock Down. Key Details: Phunware, Inc. (PHUN) announced that Chief Executive Officer Michael Snavely has stepped down from his position. Stephen Chen was named to take over as interim CEO, beginning October 22, 2024. Market Impact: The announcement had an immediate market impact, with the company's stock declining approximately 10 percent in Nasdaq trading following the news of the executive transition. This leadership change marked a significant turning point in the company's strategic direction, with Chen tasked with leading the company through a pivotal transition toward AI and next-generation technologies.
